Name: Cocktail Sort
Author: Unknown
Description: Cocktail sort, also known as bidirectional bubble sort, cocktail shaker sort, or ripple sort, is a variation of bubble sort that is both a stable sorting algorithm and a comparison sort. The algorithm differs from a bubble sort in that it sorts in both directions on each pass through the list. This sorting algorithm is only marginally more difficult to implement than a bubble sort, and solves the problem of turtles in bubble sorts.
Algorithm: async function sort(){let a=!0,r=array.length-1,t=0;for(;a;){a=!1;for(let t=0;t<r;t++){await compare(t,t+1);if(array[t]>array[t+1]){if(swap(t,t+1),await sleep(),firstRun)return;a=!0}}r--;for(let i=r-1;i>t;i--){await compare(i,i+1);if(array[i]>array[i+1]){if(swap(i,i+1),await sleep(),firstRun)return;a=!0}}t++}}
